case_title: PASS JANITORIAL SERVICE, INC. VS. RRAZZ ENTERTAINMENT WEST, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-21-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RRAZZ ENTERTAINMENT WEST, INC.
